channel.title: flove making-of — a11y questions
channel.description: New a11y design questions from flove interviews.

item.title: What is the flove approach to accessibility testing?
item.description:
• Automated + manual — Run axe/Lighthouse + manual screen reader testing. Most thorough. • Automated only — Just axe/Lighthouse. Catches obvious issues, misses nuance. • Manual only — Just manual testing. Thorough but slow, easy to skip. • AAA by design — Follow AAA patterns in development, test periodically. Proactive.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: AAA by design
